---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the install, onboarding, or troubleshooting flow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## User problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

What should change?

## Why it matters

How would this improve the current path?

## Scope check

Please confirm whether this request is mainly about:

- download flow
- installer reliability
- quick start
- troubleshooting
- tutorial/resources

## Additional context

Links, examples, or screenshots if useful.
